description: A Marketing Manager is launching a 'Spring 2025' promo campaign. Using DBeaver, modify the SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (connection name 'ChinookOps') by adding a 'campaign_tag' (TEXT) column to the 'invoices' table, ensuring existing records are marked as 'organic'. Bulk-insert new invoices for every customer in the USA ($10.00), Canada ($15.00), and France ($20.00) with 'InvoiceDate' set to '2025-04-01 00:00:00', 'campaign_tag' set to 'spring_promo_2025', and billing details copied exactly from the 'customers' table. Export a CSV report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/promo_impact_analysis.csv showing the cost breakdown with columns 'BillingCountry', 'PromoInvoicesIssued' (count), and 'TotalPromoCost' (sum) for this campaign, sorted by cost descending.
